name: Delmarva Crab Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick out shells from crabmeat and sprinkle with lemon juice.
2. Make the sauce: Heat butter and stir in flour until thick, then add milk.
Cool the sauce.
3. Beat 2 eggs with the cooled sauce and blend in mayo, breadcrumbs, salt,
pepper, mustard, and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Gently combine crabmeat with the sauce mixture and chill until firm.
5. Form into 9 to 12 patties.
6. Beat 1 egg with milk.
7. Bread cakes by dipping them in flour, then egg-milk mixture, and finally
in remaining breadcrumbs and paprika.
8. Fry in hot shortening until golden.
Recipe is typical spicy crab cakes of the Delmarva area.
